loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing live power/frequency vitals — runtime, service intervals, and availability counts are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing load percentage — run-hours and start counts are not measured by this asset's meter.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active, reactive, and apparent energy plus power factor — availability (MTBF/MTTR) and energy fractions are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing Active, Reactive, and Apparent Power and Power Factor history — the card's static 'Backup Readiness' scores (Autonomy, Runtime, Pressure, Headroom) are not measured by this electrical meter and are honestly blanked.
